case_title: SELMER, KRISTIN LENORE VS NEJERES, ELLEN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-01-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-23-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELMER, KRISTIN LENORE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEJERES, ELLEN ROMERO, VINCENT $1,067.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,184.00, DEFENDANT VINCENT ROMERO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE AND TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO NEJERES, ELLEN ET AL RETURNED TO COURT NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SELMER, KRISTIN LENORE ASSIGNED TO PAUL HEIDHUES, B INNOVATIVE FINANCIAL SERVICES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,067.00 FILED BY SELMER, KRISTIN LENORE AS TO DEFENDANT NEJERES, ELLEN ROMERO, VINCENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, VINCENT
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE RE-SENT TO DEFENDANT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEJERES, ELLEN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO ROMERO, VINCENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED FEB 23,2006 ANY TIME. $10 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-21-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-01-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEJERES, ELLEN.
